name: chutemundo
description: Plataforma deportiva de Chute Mundo con divisiones, disciplina automática, sedes reutilizables y estadísticas.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Chute Mundo es una app estática: no requiere build.')"
scripts.check:official: cat public/chute-official-part-*.txt > .chute-runtime-check.mjs && node --check .chute-runtime-check.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-model.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-ui.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-events.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-diagnostics.mjs && node --check public/chute-group-editor.mjs && node --check public/chute-premium-ui.mjs && node --check public/chute-tournament-hub.mjs && node --check public/chute-matches-v52.mjs && node --check public/chute-stats-v52.mjs && node --check public/chute-game-minute-stats.mjs && node --check public/chute-v54.mjs && node --check public/chute-v54-form-guard.mjs && node --check public/chute-v55.mjs && node --check public/chute-v56-discipline.mjs
